description: jsDelivr is a public CDN for open-source packages and project assets, especially content sourced from npm and GitHub. It also provides package metadata and usage statistics through a public API.
summary: jsdelivr.net exposes two public HTTP surfaces: the jsDelivr CDN at `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net` for open-source file delivery and the unauthenticated package/statistics API at `https://data.jsdelivr.com/v1`; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found for this domain.
